title: chopratejas/headroom
content: Headroom is a Python tool that compresses outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach language models, reducing token usage by 60–95% without sacrificing answer quality. It functions as a library, proxy, or MCP server. The project has 5,040 stars and 387 forks on GitHub.
source: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub - chopratejas

normalizedTitle: chopratejas headroom
representativeSources: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub - chopratejas

title: Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber
content: Open-LLM-VTuber is a Python application enabling hands-free voice conversations with large language models. It supports voice interruption and displays an animated Live2D avatar. The software runs locally across multiple platforms. The project has 8,065 stars and 1,059 forks.
source: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub - Open-LLM-VTuber

title: 有人知道为什么这种 Cursor 无限续杯工具可以这么便宜
content: Cheap Cursor unlimited trial tools likely rely on temporary or disposable accounts rather than legitimate API access. They exploit free tier sign-ups, shared credentials, or automated rotation of trial accounts to bypass subscription fees. This violates Cursor's terms of service, risks account bans, and may compromise user data.

title: 中产的夏天，正在戒掉「穷人的啤酒」？
content: Fruit puree beer has become the new trend among China's middle class, replacing industrial lagers and earlier craft favorites like milk and tea beers. These thick, brightly colored brews contain up to 50% real fruit puree, masking bitterness with intense sweetness and fruit flavors. While critics argue the fruit overwhelms traditional brewing artistry, supporters cite their accessibility and social media appeal. The shift reflects broader changes: Chinese beer consumption has declined 30% since 2013, with consumers moving away from bland, cheap lagers toward premium, experience-driven beverages that blur lines between beer, juice, and dessert drinks.
eventKey: 中产的夏天-正在戒掉「穷人的啤酒」
normalizedTitle: 中产的夏天 正在戒掉「穷人的啤酒」

title: 最近公司烧token比招员工还贵，老板干懵了...
content: Companies are finding AI token costs exceed employee salaries. Uber's CTO revealed 90% of engineers use AI heavily, burning through their 2026 AI budget in just four months, with per-employee monthly costs reaching $500-$2,000. Nvidia's VP similarly noted compute costs now surpass personnel expenses. The surge stems from AI agents performing recursive, self-correcting tasks that consume tokens exponentially. Some firms misguidedly use token consumption as a productivity KPI, despite no proven correlation with value output. Experts argue this reflects poor workflow adaptation rather than technology itself, urging companies to optimize human-AI collaboration rather than simply increase usage.
eventKey: 最近公司烧token比招员工还贵-老板干懵了

title: 苹果智能眼镜推迟至 2027 年底发布，其被库克视为交棒前的首要任务
content: Apple's first consumer smart glasses have been delayed to late 2027. The device resembles traditional optical glasses with cameras, audio, calls, Siri, and navigation, but lacks AR displays in its first generation. CEO Tim Cook considers it his top priority before succession. Apple aims to ship 3–5 million units in 2027 amid stalled Vision Pro development. The company faces strong competition from Meta and others, plus challenges in differentiation, battery life, AI chips, and ecosystem building.

title: Reference your own AWS Secrets Manager secrets in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Identity
content: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Identity now allows referencing existing AWS Secrets Manager secrets for outbound credential providers. Previously, AgentCore automatically created and managed secrets with limited configuration options. The new capability lets customers use preconfigured secrets, retaining full control over encryption (including customer-managed KMS keys), rotation, tags, replication, and resource policies. This supports same-Region cross-account secrets and external connectors for third-party secret managers. Users provide the secret ARN and JSON key when creating credential provider resources via console, CLI, or AI agents. Proper IAM permissions for secret access and KMS decryption are required.
eventKey: reference-your-own-aws-secrets-manager
normalizedTitle: reference your own aws secrets manager secrets in amazon bedrock agentcore identity
